data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for DST handling with stored timezone snapshots.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation that the system handles daylight saving time (DST) correctly with stored timezone snapshots. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case describes a scenario involving timezone handling but lacks concrete evidence to demonstrate that the system meets the requirement, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the system handles DST with stored timezone snapshots.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify DST handling with stored timezone snapshots.
